mechanics.excerpt: Well, could make him deadly; but not brave_ popped up few more hasty shots of my own and then took time to reload new power pack into the laser rifle. moment later, switching out another clip_ noticed Erik was gone. Jaime continued t0 work at the door; heedless of the 10
